name: Champ (Green Onion Mashed Potatoes)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in pot of boiling salted water until very tender, about 15 minutes.
- Drain potatoes thoroughly.
2. Meanwhile, bring cream and butter to a simmer in a heavy small saucepan over medium heat, stirring often. Mix in green onions. Remove from heat. Cover and let steep while potatoes cook.
3. Return potatoes to the same pot and mash. Add cream mixture and stir until blended. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
- This dish can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead. Cover; let stand at room temperature. Rewarm over low heat, stirring often.
Restaurant: Tinakilly Country House & Restaurant, Rathnew, Ireland
Notes: Champ is traditionally served with a well in the middle that has a dab of butter melting in it. The potatoes are usually eaten from "outside" to "inside," dipping each bite into the butter. This recipe was created to accompany Beef Tenderloin with Spring Vegetables.
